enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Ilaiya Nila Pozhigiradhe?

The song beautifully captures the romantic and soothing essence of a moonlit night.

Who composed the music for Payanangal Mudivathillai?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

Who sang Ilaiya Nila Pozhigiradhe?

The song was sung by the renowned playback singer S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

What is the release year of Payanangal Mudivathillai?

The movie was released in 1982.

Who wrote the lyrics for Ilaiya Nila Pozhigiradhe?

The lyrics were penned by Vairamuthu.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Ilaiya Nila Pozhigiradhe is a classic Tamil song from the movie Payanangal Mudivathillai, released in 1982. The song, composed by Ilaiyaraaja and sung by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, evokes a sense of romance and nostalgia. It paints a vivid picture of a serene night under the moonlight, capturing the emotions of love and longing. The soothing melody and poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu make it a timeless piece that continues to resonate with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ilaiya Nila Pozhigiradhe from the movie Payanangal Mudivathillai is a timeless classic that captures the essence of romance under the moonlit sky. With Ilaiyaraaja's mesmerizing composition and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam's soulful voice, this song creates a soothing and nostalgic atmosphere. Experience the magic of Tamil cinema's golden era with this unforgettable melody.
stanzaMeanings: The young moon is shining, reaching the heart.
The cloud that travels the world dreams and sees the sky celebrating.
On the way, in the dew and rain, the young moon gets wet every day.
In the sky street, when the cloud parade is seen, it gives comfort.
In the eyes of the young girl, dreams will come.
The fragrance is spreading, have the addresses been lost? If the addresses are wrong, will it cry like rain?
In the blue sky, the silver streaks are running, what are these antics?
Who sowed the new gems in the space?
The young moon is shining, reaching the heart.
